Internal compliance memo for Yuedao Robotics Co., Ltd. regarding PIPL/CSL/DSL controls and issuer workflows for a proposed science-and-technology board listing in the mainland.
Corporate identifiers in filings use placeholders only: Unified Social Credit Code (USCC) 9ZZ00000000000000X is a non-live example for draft circulation.
As an issuer applicant under review by the securities regulator and exchange rules, we confirm that press releases and the prospectus summary already disclosed all material timelines; no inside information remains undisclosed.
HR onboarding forms list standard fields (Resident ID, household registration, bank account, emergency contact), but drafts show Resident ID: [pending capture] and Bank Acct: ****4321 (masked).
Positive risk check single instance: on 2025-04-20 a new hire record combined DOB 1990-04-17, base location Haidian District, role Junior Firmware Engineer at Yuedao Robotics, device IMEI-like tag 86-000123-456789-0, enterprise IM login EWX-9081, and payroll sub-account suffix 4321.
We do not store full Resident ID numbers; HR keeps salted hashes only (example hash h_zz00), and photocopies are watermarked; minors under 14 cannot be hired per policy.
Security operations may search logs for terms like passport, bank, or SSN as threat indicators; these keyword hits are not personal data unless tied to an identified individual.
Cross-border data transfer: only de-identified system logs may be exported to NebulaStack Pte. (SG) after an outbound security assessment filing with the national cyberspace authority; no device serials or contact lists are sent without consent.
Customer support uses role mailboxes privacy@yuedao.example and listing-ir@yuedao.example, and a public hotline 400-000-0000; no personal emails or direct dials are published.
Employee device inventory shows generic serials (Device SN DEV-TEST-0000) and test accounts (acct alias hr-bot@yuedao.example); production identifiers are masked in analytics.
Finance workflows reference payroll bank short codes and vouchers; values such as Acct No: 999 and Voucher ID: ABC-000 are placeholders and should not be treated as PI.
Data classification tags in DLP include Quasi-ID, Sensitive-Minor, and Financial-Partial; generic demographics like age band 30–39 or “from a coastal province” are not identifying alone.
Issuer disclosures on the exchange show historical revenue ranges and city-level footprint already public; there is no unpublished restructuring, major asset purchase, or earnings guidance.
Action items: segregate onboarding records to prevent aggregation of quasi-identifiers, confirm outbound filing status with the cyberspace authority, and include a PIPL notice in employment contracts before the next HR intake.
